signals.headline: South Korea's Annual Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's Annual Inflation Rises to 2.2% in March 2026 | YES | MED confidence**  
This is the latest reported figure, up from 2.0% in January and February 2026 but below market forecasts of 2.4%, confirmed via Statistics Korea data updated in March 2026[1]. It aligns with the Bank of Korea's revised 2026 inflation outlook of 2.2% (raised from 2.1%) amid Middle East conflict-driven energy shock

signals.headline: Switzerland Loses 60-84 to Bosnia-Herzegovina in FIBA World Cup 2027 Qualifier, Remains Winless and Bottom of Group C**
signals.raw:
Switzerland Loses 60-84 to Bosnia-Herzegovina in FIBA World Cup 2027 Qualifier, Remains Winless and Bottom of Group C** | YES | HIGH confidence[1]

Switzerland suffered its third straight defeat in Group C of the FIBA Basketball World Cup 2027 qualifiers, falling 60-84 on the road to Bosnia-Herzegovina, both previously winless teams[1]. The loss after halftime trailing by 14 points eliminates any
